reasoning: The control requires multifactor authentication (MFA) for both privileged and non-privileged accounts. In Kubernetes, while there isn't a direct MFA implementation like in cloud IAM services, using an external identity provider with OIDC can facilitate MFA. Additionally, ensuring that the API server is configured to authenticate users via an identity provider that supports MFA can achieve similar security objectives. Disabling automatic service account token mounting can further reduce the risk of unauthorized access.
title: 3_5_3: 3.5.3 Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts
